hero.desc: Attract more clients, manage your business easily, and earn passive income. A modern solution for EV station owners.

features.label: ADVANTAGES
features.title: Key Advantages for Your Network
features.card1Title: No need to develop your own app
features.card1Desc: Developing your own app requires significant resources that are better spent on expanding your station network.
features.card2Title: No more need for marketing campaigns
features.card2Desc: We gathered all EV stations on one platform, providing drivers with a single source of truth and boosting your sales.
features.card3Title: Easily manage your business with our panel
features.card3Desc: You are in control! Set prices, create custom tariffs, track transactions, and apply discounts through the partner panel.
features.card4Title: No Call Center or IT Department Required
features.card4Desc: Charge-One has you covered! Building your own IT department can be unprofitable for small networks.
features.card5Title: Create your own kilowatt packages for annual sales
features.card5Desc: Offer attractive packages with a few clicks, receiving large payments upfront from users.

clients.label: THE APP
clients.title: What awaits my clients?
clients.f1: All charging stations in one place
clients.f3: Ability to charge EVs with a discount
clients.f4: Purchase profitable kilowatt packages from the operator
clients.f5: And much more coming soon from Charge-One

partners.label: PARTNERSHIP
partners.title: Partnership Types
partners.directDesc: Add your charging station to Charge-One, and users will be able to charge their EVs at your stations using our app.
partners.indirectDesc: Add your charging station to Charge-One to advertise your charging point and attract more clients to your location.

process.label: PROCESS
process.title: Working process with Charge-One
process.s1Desc: Contact us for an initial discussion.
process.s3Title: Adding the station to the platform
process.s3Desc: Integration of your station into our system.
process.s5Desc: First clients arrive at your stations.
process.s6Desc: Convenient withdrawal of funds at any time.

footer.desc: Innovative EV charging network. We turn your station into a source of stable income.
